summary: User + the configuration/governance surface: WRITE on the governed corpus, manage the audit-log retention/integrity, and CRUD the feature-gate environment-variable definitions AND values. The in-app Admin role -- NOT Dataverse System Administrator or Power Platform Administrator.
appliesTo: Management / configuration owner: edits the provider & inspection-address corpus, resolves ImprovementSignals, sets the env-var feature gates and per-environment config values, and reviews/administers the audit trail. Superset of CollisionSpike User.

lifecycle.note: Phase 9 / ADR-0017 G8. Created live by 28-roles.ps1 but NEVER assigned. This file is FULL/self-contained (it restates every User privilege plus the Admin additions) -- 28-roles.ps1 never merges roles, so each role JSON is the complete grant. 'Admin' here is the APP settings/audit role, not Dataverse System Administrator. See docs/roles-and-permissions.md.

businessUnit.note: Single-BU environment: 'Organization' depth == all rows. Same model as the User role.

tablePrivileges.rationale: Inherits User's case CRUD. Delete STILL withheld at this in-app tier -- automated case disposition/erasure (ADR-0017) runs as the disposition flow's identity, not an interactive Admin, so even Admin does not get an everyday case-delete button. (If a manual admin delete UI is later wanted, raise Delete here deliberately.)
Same as User: full CRUD on case attachments.
Inherits User's triage CRUD AND gains Delete -- an Admin may purge a mis-triaged / test triage row as a configuration/cleanup action (still subject to the dedup caveat; do so knowingly).
Same as User: full CRUD on chasers.
Same as User: full CRUD on notes.

ADMIN ADDITION: Management TRIAGES the improvement-signal queue. Where User can only Create+Read (raise a signal), Admin gains Write + Delete to resolve/classify/clear signals (the 'ImprovementSignal feeds a review queue Management works' governance rule).

ADMIN ADDITION: Management EDITS the provider corpus. Create+Read+Write+Append/AppendTo. Delete WITHHELD -- referenced providers are NEVER hard-deleted (Case/PO history depends on old principal codes); they are deactivated/archived/merged via the cr1bd_active flag (a Write), never deleted (governance rule).
ADMIN ADDITION: Management edits the repairer corpus. Create+Read+Write+Append/AppendTo. Delete WITHHELD (same archive-not-delete rule; a referenced repairer is deactivated/merged, not deleted).

ADMIN ADDITION: Management curates the offline-derived inspection-address suggestions corpus (ADR-0013/0016). Create+Read+Write+Append/AppendTo. Delete WITHHELD (archive-not-delete; the corpus is bulk-reseeded offline via 16-seed-suggested-addresses, and a referenced row is superseded, not deleted).
ADMIN ADDITION: Management edits image-source corpus rows. Create+Read+Write+Append/AppendTo. Delete WITHHELD (archive-not-delete).
Same as User: Create/Read/Write/Append (no Delete) on per-field provenance.

ADMIN ADDITION (audit-log MANAGEMENT). Create+Read like User, PLUS Delete -- the ADR-0017 audit-trail-integrity item gives Admin the cascade/disposition authority over audit rows (what becomes of audit rows when a Case is hard-deleted by disposition/DSAR). Write STILL WITHHELD -- audit rows are append-only and must never be EDITED in place even by an Admin (tamper-evidence); the only mutation an Admin may perform is a governed Delete (retention cascade), not an edit.

miscPrivileges.rationale: ADMIN ADDITION: manage the feature-gate env-var DEFINITIONS (EVA_API_ENABLED, BOX_* set, ...). Definition = the gate's name/type/default.

Read the env-var definitions (the gate catalogue). NOTE: the Code App reads gate VALUES read-only at runtime under whatever role it runs as; this Admin grant is for the configuration UI/manual edits, not the app's runtime read.
Edit a gate definition (rename/default/description). Used rarely (definitions ship in the solution); included so an Admin can adjust without System Administrator.
Set the per-environment VALUE that overrides a gate's default -- THE activation lever (flip BOX_API_ENABLED true, set BOX_FOLDER_ROOT_ID, etc.). This is the heart of 'Admin = settings'.
Read the per-environment gate values (what is currently on/off, what config strings are set).
Change an existing gate value (toggle a gate, update a config string). Paired with Create for full value management.

Remove a per-environment override so the gate falls back to its solution default (e.g. revert ENRICHMENT_ENABLED's Dev currentValue back to the default=false). Deliberately NO delete on the DEFINITION (definitions are solution components, not Admin-deletable).

notes: Admin = User + corpus WRITE + improvement-signal triage + env-var (gate) CRUD + audit-log Delete (cascade). It is the in-app SETTINGS/AUDIT role from docs/roles-and-permissions.md, NOT Dataverse System Administrator and NOT Power Platform Administrator (those are operator/platform roles).

DEFAULT-DENY still applies: no solution-customization, no table-schema, no flow, no security-role-management privileges. An Admin configures gates + corpus + audit; it does NOT build tables or edit flows (that stays System Administrator / the build pipeline).

The environment-variable privileges are EXPRESSED BY NAME (miscPrivileges), not as cr1bd_* table privileges, because environmentvariabledefinition/environmentvariablevalue are built-in Dataverse tables (UserOwned, Standard). 28-roles.ps1 resolves prv*EnvironmentVariable* names to GUIDs at apply time exactly like the cr1bd_* table privileges.

Delete on auditevent is the ONLY place Admin can touch the audit trail beyond append+read, and even then ONLY delete (cascade/retention), never in-place Write -- audit rows stay append-only/tamper-evident.
